title: hieracium paltinae subsp. reservationis
intro: Hieracium paltinae subsp. reservationis, also known as Hawkweed, is a rare and lesser-known species of the Hieracium genus, which is a group of flowering plants in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Hieracium paltinae subsp. reservationis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antimicrobial protection. The herbal preparations of Hieracium paltinae subsp. reservationis often involve drying the leaves and flowers, then infusing them in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams for medicinal use.
